macro.title: Warsh moves to closer to Fed chair confirmation, advancing in Senate committee vote
macro.what: The Senate Banking Committee advanced Kevin Warsh 13-11 for Fed chair, with a full Senate vote possible before Jerome Powell's term expires.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: The Price Point: What $500,000 Buys Across America Right Now
macro.what: In this inaugural edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re starting with a rather fickle figure: $500,000
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Castlelake, Redwood form $8B prime jumbo mortgage joint venture
housing.what: Castlelake and Redwood Trust have formed a joint venture to purchase up to $8 billion of prime jumbo mortgage loans, the companies announced Tuesday.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: This housing market looks like 2017 but isn’t
housing.what: The housing market looks like 2017, but the data tells a different story
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Mortgage applications drop 1.6% as borrower intent shrinks
housing.what: Mortgage applications fell 1.6% as the 30-year fixed rate rose to 6.37%, refinance fell 4% and purchases rose 21% year over year.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Multifamily players spot recovery signs amid risks and headwinds
housing.what: NAIOP’s Spring 2026 CRE Sentiment Index points to slightly better conditions for multifamily over the next 12 months
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Virginia adapts California’s pioneering church-land housing model
housing.what: Virginia has become the latest state to clear the way for churches and other faith groups to build affordable housing on their land, borrowing a page from a California precedent-setting attainable housing win-win innovation
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The Reveal in NYC: This ‘One-of-a-Kind’ Apartment Just Off City Hall Park is Now Listed for $2.2 Million
housing.what: Surrounded by the hustle and bustle of Lower Manhattan, this two-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bathroom loft-style apartment is listed for $2,199,000
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Coming Soon in New Jersey: This 3-Bedroom, 2-Bath Fixer-Upper Less Than an Hour From NYC is Set to Hit the Market This Week
housing.what: Just under an hour drive away from New York City, this Woodbridge, New Jersey 1,121-square-foot house is set to hit the market this week with a list price of $499,000
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Atlantic Avenue remains top dog in HECM broker report
notables.what: Atlantic Avenue led February HECM TPO broker rankings with 901 endorsements in the prior 12 months, including 64 in February, per HECMWorld.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Fannie Mae trims expenses, posts $3.7B profit in Q1 2026
notables.what: Fannie Mae earned $3.7B in Q1 2026 on $7.3B in revenue, with expenses down 19% and net worth rising to $112.7B.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Keller Williams acquires Michael Lewis Marketing Suite
notables.what: Keller Williams acquired MLMS, a marketing partner serving 130,000 agents, and plans network-wide deployment by end of Q3 2026.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: The Gathering: Jason Mitchell defends referral networks as fees face scrutiny
notables.what: Jason Mitchell says JMG’s average co broke was 2.6% on referrals and self generated leads, keeping referral fees off consumers.
